tasks.title: Sync DIRECTIVES.md with Taskmaster
tasks.description: Populate Queued section from tasks.json IDs; document sync policy.
tasks.details: Mirror task IDs D001+ to Taskmaster numeric ids.

tasks.title: Configure .env for Taskmaster AI providers
tasks.description: Set OPENAI_API_KEY and OPENAI_BASE_URL for LM Studio (see .env.example). Start LM Studio with qwen3.5-4b loaded.
tasks.details: Never commit .env; modelId in .taskmaster/config.json must match the model name LM Studio exposes.

tasks.title: Re-run parse-prd when LM Studio is available
tasks.description: Run task-master parse-prd .taskmaster/docs/prd.txt to refresh task graph.
tasks.details: LM Studio must be running; replace or merge generated tasks per human preference.

tasks.title: Seed memory MCP from docs/MEMORY_SEED.md
tasks.description: Write project constants via memory MCP when Cursor session has memory enabled.

tasks.title: Verify MCP servers show green in Cursor
Commit governance scaffold to Git
tasks.description: Single logical commit with message D001: Governance scaffold | verified clean.

tasks.title: Confirm product stack and update ARCHITECTURE
tasks.description: Replace TBD sections with chosen language, framework, and module map.

tasks.title: Add application source tree (post-stack confirmation)
tasks.description: Scaffold src/, tests, and build per confirmed stack.

tasks.title: Optional: tm rules --setup for Cursor integration
tasks.description: Run task-master rules setup if recommended by Taskmaster version.

tasks.title: cursor-governance installer — Windows PowerShell readline + no ora (D014)
tasks.description: Verify readline prompts and console logging in cursor-governance/setup.js on Windows; no enquirer/ora.
tasks.details: Prerequisite for D015. Mark done when Windows path is verified.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual: run setup.js in PowerShell through full prompt flow.

tasks.title: Linux compatibility for cursor-governance installer (D015)
tasks.description: Scope: cursor-governance/setup.js only. OS-aware Python/pip/uv and paths; no hardcoded Windows paths.
tasks.details: process.platform win32|linux|darwin. Print 'Detected platform: …' at start. findPython(): Linux/Mac python3 then python; Windows python first (keep py -3 fallbacks as needed). Pip: pip3-first on Linux/Mac, pip on Windows. uv: Windows pip install uv; Linux/Mac pip3 install uv, fallback curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh. Use path.join everywhere; mcp.json via os.homedir() only — audit for C:\\Users. Prerequisites check: Linux prefers python3. npm install -g failures: suggest sudo on Linux. node --check setup.js. Windows behavior unchanged.
tasks.testStrategy: node --check setup.js; run installer on Linux and Windows; confirm python3/pip3 on Linux.
